---
title: Jira (PSOM)
---

Tables in the `jira` schema, populated by the weekly PSOM Jira Service
Management sync pipeline.

Each Monday at ~6:00 AM ET, the `psom-weekly-sync` Lambda fetches a full
snapshot of all tickets from the PSOM project (`jtickets.atlassian.net`) and
writes it as a Parquet partition in S3. The Glue crawler then updates the
Athena table schema.

{{< include jira/psom.qmd >}}
